svg.title: An Agent Is a System, Not a Prompt
svg.desc: A tidy hand-drawn component map showing an orchestrator connected to context, memory, tools, guardrails, and evaluation. Evaluation feeds corrections back into the orchestrator.
svg.text: An Agent Is a System, Not a Prompt
Context, memory, tools, guardrails, and evaluation make it reliable.
Reliability comes from the loop — not one clever instruction.
